title: coryphopteris vitiensis
intro: Coryphopteris vitiensis, also known as the Vitiensis fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in Pacific Island medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Vitiensis fern is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of the Coryphopteris vitiensis are typically harvested, dried, and used to make teas or infusions.
